subcodes.first_line: O assured and enraptured leaf! Thy eloquent missive and fluent letter hath reached me, its meanings betokening immersion in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مطمئنه منجذبه تحریر بلیغ و مسطور فصیح رسید معانی دلالت بر استغراق در
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
